taxonomy.title: Invalid JSON file in evidence bundle or fixtures
taxonomy.description: A .json file under self_improvement_v2/ does not parse correctly.
taxonomy.detection: python -m json.tool <file> or OfflineQualityGate JSON parse check
taxonomy.remediation: Fix the malformed JSON. Validate with python -m json.tool before committing.

taxonomy.title: Missing expected JSON output file
taxonomy.description: A required evidence bundle or attribution output file does not exist.
taxonomy.remediation: Run the corresponding builder/aggregator to regenerate the missing file.

taxonomy.title: Signal validator fails on valid fixture
taxonomy.description: A fixture that should validate as PASS produces WARN or FAIL.
taxonomy.detection: pytest test_rainbow_signal_validator.py or golden path test
taxonomy.remediation: Check if fixture timestamps are stale (update to recent time) or validator threshold changed.

taxonomy.title: Contract drift detected
taxonomy.description: Signal envelope structure diverges from contract snapshot.
taxonomy.remediation: Review drift report. If expected, update contract snapshot. If unexpected, fix signal structure.

taxonomy.title: Shadowlock event mapping fails
taxonomy.description: Signal event type not recognized in shadowlock event mapper.
taxonomy.remediation: Add missing event type to ShadowlockEventMapper or fix signal source.

taxonomy.title: Evidence bundle builder fails
taxonomy.description: EvidenceBundleBuilder cannot build a valid bundle from source manifest and fixtures.
taxonomy.remediation: Check source_manifest.json and fixture directory structure.

taxonomy.title: Integrity manifest file count mismatch
taxonomy.description: The integrity manifest lists a different number of files than expected.

taxonomy.title: Referenced file missing in integrity manifest
taxonomy.description: A file listed in the integrity manifest does not exist on disk.
taxonomy.remediation: Restore the missing file or regenerate the integrity manifest.

taxonomy.title: Regime fixture has wrong schema
taxonomy.description: A regime-label fixture is missing required fields (timestamp_utc, symbol_or_pair, regime_label, confidence, source, metadata).
taxonomy.remediation: Fix the fixture JSON to include all required fields per the schema.

taxonomy.title: Source-regime stats fixture missing
taxonomy.description: Source-regime stats fixtures are missing and attribution aggregator returns degraded.

taxonomy.title: Attribution aggregator returns degraded
taxonomy.description: OfflineAttributionAggregator cannot load stats data and returns degraded status.
taxonomy.remediation: Check source-regime-stats fixture directory or aggregator configuration.

taxonomy.title: Attribution report renderer missing input
taxonomy.description: AttributionReportRenderer cannot find attribution summary JSON. Returns degraded report.
taxonomy.remediation: Run attribution aggregator first or restore offline_attribution_summary.json.

taxonomy.title: Offline episode returns RED verdict
taxonomy.description: OfflineEpisode cannot load one or more required artifacts.
taxonomy.remediation: Check which required artifact is missing from the episode result output.

taxonomy.title: Episode report renderer produces degraded output
taxonomy.description: OfflineEpisodeReportRenderer produces YELLOW report due to missing optional artifacts.
taxonomy.remediation: Add missing optional artifacts (golden path, attribution) or accept YELLOW status.

taxonomy.title: Phase 1 readiness matrix shows RED or YELLOW
taxonomy.description: Required artifacts are missing, producing a non-GREEN readiness verdict.
taxonomy.remediation: Implement the missing artifacts listed in the readiness matrix.

taxonomy.title: Missing governance artifacts
taxonomy.description: Governance items (#120-#125) are not yet implemented.
taxonomy.remediation: Implement governance issues in order: CI smoke, taxonomy, approval gate, dashboard, blockers, runbook.

taxonomy.title: Controlled dry-run rehearsal not yet performed
taxonomy.description: No controlled dry-run rehearsal has been executed yet.
taxonomy.detection: Manual — controlled_dry_run_rehearsal.md is a runbook, not an execution log.
taxonomy.remediation: Follow the rehearsal runbook (#125) after governance layer is complete.

severity_definitions.info: Informational — no action required, but noted for planning.
severity_definitions.warning: Non-blocking issue that should be reviewed before moving to next phase.
severity_definitions.blocking: Blocks progression to live-readiness assessment. Must be resolved first.
severity_definitions.critical: Reserved for live-trading safety violations. Immediate stop and escalate.
